name: Blueberry Lemon Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Gold Medal Better for Bread Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully and place all ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Select the Sweet or Basic/White cycle.
3. Choose Medium or Light crust setting.
4. Push start. Using a delay timer is acceptable.
5. The recipe makes a 1 1/2 lb loaf.
